name: NVIDIA GPU (CUDA)
description: NVIDIA GPUs via CUDA — the assumed baseline for all PT2 issues

name: AMD GPU (ROCm)
description: AMD GPUs via ROCm backend — community-maintained, separate oncall

name: Intel CPU
description: CPU-only execution path (Intel) — no GPU accelerator

name: ARM CPU
description: ARM architecture CPUs — includes Apple Silicon CPU path and server ARM

name: Apple MPS (Metal)
description: Apple Metal Performance Shaders — limited PT2 support

name: Linux
description: Linux — the assumed baseline OS for all PT2 issues

name: Windows
description: Windows — less tested, known path separator and multiprocessing issues

name: macOS
description: macOS — limited GPU support (MPS only), CPU path works
